activities_projects.title: Measuring Current in Series Circuit
activities_projects.objective: Observe how current behaves in series circuit with multiple bulbs
steps: Connect bulbs in series with battery and ammeter
Close the switch and note current reading
Add or remove bulbs and observe current changes
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands effect of number of components on current in series
activities_projects.evaluation: Accurate current measurements and observations (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Measuring Voltage Across Bulbs in Series and Parallel
activities_projects.objective: Compare voltage distribution in series and parallel circuits
steps: Connect bulbs in series and measure voltage across each
Connect bulbs in parallel and measure voltage across each
Compare and record differences
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands how voltage divides in series and remains same in parallel
activities_projects.evaluation: Correct voltage readings and comparison (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Testing Conductors and Insulators
activities_projects.objective: Identify materials that allow or block current
steps: Insert different materials in a simple circuit
Observe whether bulb glows
Record which materials are conductors and which are insulators

activities_projects.title: Resistance Observation
activities_projects.objective: Understand effect of wire thickness and length on current
materials: Wires of different lengths and thicknesses
steps: Connect circuit with different wire lengths and thicknesses
Measure current each time using ammeter
Observe how wire properties affect current
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Learns practical effect of resistance in circuit

activities_projects.title: Series-Parallel Combination Circuit
activities_projects.objective: Construct and study a combination of series and parallel circuit
steps: Connect bulbs in combination of series and parallel
Close switch and observe brightness of each bulb
Explain why some bulbs are brighter than others
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands combined circuits and current/voltage distribution
activities_projects.evaluation: Correct circuit construction and explanation (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Effect of Switch Placement
activities_projects.objective: Observe how placement of switch affects circuit operation
steps: Connect bulbs in series and insert switches at different points
Observe which bulbs turn on/off with each switch
Record observations and explain
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Learns practical use of switches in circuit control

activities_projects.title: Measuring Current in Parallel Circuit
activities_projects.objective: Understand current distribution in parallel circuit
steps: Connect bulbs in parallel with ammeter in each branch
Measure current through each bulb
Compare total current with sum of individual branch currents
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands current distribution in parallel circuits

activities_projects.title: Observing Short Circuit
activities_projects.objective: Understand what happens in a short circuit
steps: Connect circuit bypassing the bulb (direct connection)
Observe effect on battery and wires
Explain why short circuits are dangerous
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Learns concept and hazards of short circuits

activities_projects.title: Circuit Fault Identification
activities_projects.objective: Detect and correct faults in a given circuit
materials: Pre-made faulty circuit (broken wire or loose connection)
steps: Examine circuit to locate fault
Repair connection and test circuit
Explain what caused the fault
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Develops troubleshooting skills in electrical circuits
activities_projects.evaluation: Successful fault detection and explanation (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Design Your Own Circuit Challenge
activities_projects.objective: Apply concepts creatively in designing a circuit
steps: Design a circuit with at least 2 bulbs in combination (series/parallel)
Draw diagram and label components
Explain operation of your circuit
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Encourages creativity and application of learned concepts
activities_projects.evaluation: Accuracy and creativity in circuit design (10 marks)
